name: Contact
description: Hello Vietnam contact page — intro, contact + form grid, FAQs.

fields.heading: We check our WhatsApp constantly.
fields.body: Ping us any time. We're a small team — you'll hear back from a real human, probably Huong, probably within a few hours.

fields.form_subheading: We reply in the order we receive.

faqs.a: Most nationalities can get an e-visa online in under 10 minutes. We'll send you the exact link and walk you through it once you book.
Absolutely. Vietnam is a vegetarian paradise — just tell us in the booking form and we'll tailor every meal.
Full refund up to 30 days before. 50% between 30 and 7 days. After that we'll do our best — life happens.

faqs.q: How fit do I need to be?
faqs.a: If you can walk 5km comfortably, you're good. We mark any strenuous add-ons clearly in the itinerary.
